forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 assignees:
 - claude-code
 position_column: done
-position_ordinal: ffffffffffffffffffffab80
+position_ordinal: ffffffffffffffffffffffffffc680
 title: Add tests for workspace follower retry and try_promote
 ---
 workspace.rs

Coverage: 76.3% (58/76 lines)

Uncovered lines: 52, 102, 106, 110, 128, 141, 143-144, 151, 154, 180, 217, 223, 257-260, 271

Three areas:
1. Follower retry loop (lines 128-154) - retries waiting for DB file, backoff, exhaustion after >10 retries
2. `try_promote` (lines 204-236) - promotes follower to leader: opens RW connection, runs startup_cleanup, transitions mode
3. `DbRef::Owned` deref (line 271) + Debug impl (lines 257-260)

Test scenarios:
- Open as follower before leader creates DB → verify retry loop runs, eventually succeeds or errors
- Drop leader, call try_promote on follower → verify returns Some(shared_db), is_leader() now true
- DbRef::Owned path via follower .db() call
- WorkspaceMode Debug impl

#coverage-gap #coverage-gap
\ No newline at end of file
